Quality Education.reason: As a university seminar, this course is a form of quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly discusses Xunzi's philosophy on 'education' and 'moral cultivation'.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is an explicit partnership between two universities (NCCU and NYCU) to share knowledge and teaching, directly reflecting Target 17.6 on enhancing cooperation and knowledge sharing.
evidence: This seminar will join a course taught by prof. Kai-Yuan Cheng at NYCU, and the meeting places will alternate between these two campuses
